entity.label: Atroth-shophan
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Hidden, or hollow, a town east of Jordan (Num. 32:35), built by the children of Gad. This word should probably be joined with the word preceding it in this passage, Atroth-Shophan, as in the Revised Version.

nodes.label: Atroth-shophan
nodes.description: Hidden, or hollow, a town east of Jordan (Num. 32:35), built by the children of Gad. This word should probably be joined with the word preceding it in this passage, Atroth-Shophan, as in the Revised Version.

verses.text: And Atroth, Shophan, and Jaazer, and Jogbehah,
